textPlain: MANETs: back from the dead!? The problem is not the hardware, but the software; apparently, nobody can think of a killer application.
This guy has been promoting and hacking hardware around this project heavily the last few months: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=550fh2n5rUs
The killer application in this case is ATAK.https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Android_Team_Awareness_Kit
That guy is not contributing to the open source project.
